nodes.label: Start
nodes.description: Entry point for the full scrape pipeline. Stamps original_scrape_id for provenance and hands off to LoadProfile.

nodes.label: Load profile
nodes.description: Fetches the per-hostname ScrapeProfile (css selectors, ready_selector, obstacle hints) from the api. Missing profile is fine — later nodes degrade to generic behavior.

nodes.label: Navigate
nodes.description: Drives the browser to the submitted URL and records the landed final_url. Navigation failure stamps failure_reason but still advances (later nodes see empty content).

nodes.label: Resolve final URL
nodes.description: Canonicalizes the landed URL (strips tracker params, fragments). If the browser redirected to a different host, creates a child scrape via source_scrape FK so the tracker→destination hop is queryable.

nodes.label: Check link dedup
nodes.description: Queries /job-posts/?filter[link]=canonical for a non-stub hit (>= 60 words of description). On hit, short-circuits to DuplicateShortCircuit without scraping further.

nodes.label: Duplicate short-circuit
nodes.description: Terminal: we already have a full JobPost for this URL. Returns outcome='duplicate' with the existing job_post_id so the caller can navigate the user there.

nodes.label: Wait ready selector
nodes.description: When the profile has a ready_selector (signals SPA content has rendered), waits up to 5s for it. Hit → ExpandTruncations; miss → SettleWait.

nodes.label: Settle wait
nodes.description: Fallback fixed 2s sleep when no ready_selector is known, giving SPAs a chance to finish rendering before capture.

nodes.label: Expand truncations
nodes.description: Clicks 'Show more' / 'Read more' affordances so the captured content isn't a stub. Best-effort — failures don't block.

nodes.label: Detect obstacle
nodes.description: Scans the page body for login-wall signals. Clean → Capture; walled → routes to the obstacle handler with available retries (RememberMe → WaitRetry → Agent → Fail).

nodes.label: Remember-me reauth
nodes.description: Tries the 'Continue as <you>' re-auth path using a known profile selector. Recorded per-attempt so we don't loop on it.

nodes.label: Wait + retry
nodes.description: Soaks up transient auth walls by sleeping 3s and re-checking. Caps at 3 waits before escalating to ObstacleAgent.

nodes.label: Obstacle agent
nodes.description: LLM-driven fallback: inspects the page and proposes a CSS selector to click. On success, the winning selector is fed back into the ScrapeProfile's probation gate.

nodes.label: Obstacle fail
nodes.description: Terminal: every obstacle path has been exhausted. Returns outcome='failure' with failure_reason='login_wall' so the caller can re-queue after seeding cookies.

nodes.label: Capture
nodes.description: Reads page.inner_text('body') and page.content() into state.job_content / state.html. This is the moment the browser is 'done'.

nodes.label: Persist scrape
nodes.description: PATCHes the scrape with job_content + html + status='extracting'. Marks the handoff from browser side to extract side.

nodes.label: Start extract
nodes.description: Entry point for the extract-only sub-graph. Used by paste / email / chat ingest, and by the full pipeline once PersistScrape lands.

nodes.label: Tier 0 CSS
nodes.description: Phase 1b placeholder: deferred to server-side parse_scrape until the api ships /tier0-extract/. Records a soft skip and lets Tier 1 handle it.

nodes.label: Tier 1 mini
nodes.description: Cheap, fast LLM pass (gpt-4o-mini by default). POSTs to /api/v1/scrapes/:id/llm-extract/ with the tier's model spec. EvaluateExtraction decides whether to escalate.

nodes.label: Tier 2 haiku
nodes.description: Mid-tier escalation (claude-haiku-4-5). Same endpoint as Tier1; the tier label on TierAttempt is what distinguishes them in the retrospective analysis.

nodes.label: Tier 3 sonnet
nodes.description: Expensive last-resort tier (claude-sonnet-4-6). Gated by SCRAPE_GRAPH_ENABLE_TIER3=1; otherwise the graph terminates at ExtractFail after Tier 2.

nodes.label: Evaluate extraction
nodes.description: LLM-output quality gate: checks for title, company, and thin-description. Pass → ValidateExtraction; fail → next tier or ExtractFail.

nodes.label: Validate extraction
nodes.description: Content-quality gate between EvaluateExtraction-passed and PersistJobPost. Enforces source-text minimum word count and loading-shell fingerprints (Salesforce Lightning, Workday, cookie/JS notices). Catches LLM hallucinations off a never-hydrated SPA bootstrap. Fail → ExtractFail so the debug-artifact invariant fires.

nodes.label: Persist job post
nodes.description: POSTs parsed data to /api/v1/scrapes/:id/persist-extraction/ which handles dedup, stub-upgrade, and posted_date fallback.

nodes.label: Update profile
nodes.description: Feeds the outcome (success + tier0_hit flag) back into the ScrapeProfile so per-host statistics and selector probation can evolve. Shadow-suppressed.

nodes.label: Resolve apply URL
nodes.description: Phase 1b: no-op that returns outcome='success'. Phase 2 will resolve the external apply destination (Greenhouse/Lever/LinkedIn portal) and stash it on the JobPost.

nodes.label: Extract fail
nodes.description: Terminal: every tier produced something EvaluateExtraction rejected, or persistence failed. outcome='failure' with failure_reason='extraction'.
